name: Marvelous Macaroons
recipeIngredient: 8 oz DOLE Crushed Pineapple with Juice (can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple well and reserve the juice for beverage.
2. In a large bowl, combine the drained pineapple, sweetened condensed milk, coconut, almonds, melted margarine, 1 teaspoon lemon peel, and almond extract. Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
3. In a small bowl, mix together the flour and baking powder.
4. Add the dry mixture to the pineapple mixture in several additions, stirring gently until just combined.
5. Drop heaping tablespoonfuls of dough onto greased cookie sheets, spacing them about 1 inch apart.
6. Bake at 350°F for 13-15 minutes or until lightly golden.
7. Allow cookies to cool on wire racks before storing in the refrigerator.
Makes 3 1/2 dozen cookies.
